packages.name: Small Portrait
packages.description: A hand-painted portrait from a photograph, capturing likeness and mood in oils or acrylics.
packages.includes: Portrait painting, certificate of authenticity, packaged for safe delivery

packages.name: Medium Portrait
packages.description: A larger, more detailed portrait with richer tonal range and texture.
packages.includes: Portrait painting, certificate of authenticity, packaged for safe delivery
packages.notes: Ideal for couples or family portraits

packages.name: Landscape / Custom
packages.description: A bespoke painting of a place, scene, or abstract concept of your choosing.
packages.includes: Painting, certificate of authenticity, packaged for safe delivery
packages.notes: Prices vary by size and complexity
